raw_args._raw_params:
install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyrings
if [ ! -f /etc/apt/keyrings/holla.gpg ]; then
  curl -fsSL https://holla-apt.tailrocks.com/holla.gpg    | tee /etc/apt/keyrings/holla.gpg > /dev/null
  echo "installed"
else
  echo "exists"
fi

result.cmd:
install -m 0755 -d /etc/apt/keyrings
if [ ! -f /etc/apt/keyrings/holla.gpg ]; then
  curl -fsSL https://holla-apt.tailrocks.com/holla.gpg    | tee /etc/apt/keyrings/holla.gpg > /dev/null
  echo "installed"
else
  echo "exists"
fi
